name: async-git-worktree
description: Git worktree operations via asyncio.create_subprocess_exec. Handle branch prefix refs/heads/ in porcelain output. Use git add -N to include untracked files in diff.

name: tmux-runtime-management
description: Use asyncio.create_subprocess_exec wrappers for tmux session management, and treat no-server or missing-session tmux errors as non-fatal when listing, capturing, or killing sessions.

outcomes.test_results: pytest -q; ruff check src tests; python -m compileall src tests

name: agent-pool-lifecycle
description: AgentPool wires TmuxManager, WorktreeManager, RUNTIME_REGISTRY, and Store into a unified lifecycle manager. spawn() creates worktree + tmux session and persists AgentSlot; send_task() uses send_keys; check_status() uses is_alive and auto-marks dead; collect_result() uses capture_pane + get_diff; release() kills session + removes worktree; cleanup() iterates dead/idle slots. Store is synchronous SQLite; tmux/worktrees are async. Tests use in-memory Store + AsyncMock for tmux/worktrees.

name: ready-detection-via-tmux-polling
description: AgentPool._wait_for_ready() polls capture_pane every 1s matching runtime-specific ready_pattern regex, raises RuntimeError on timeout after killing session and removing worktree

name: runtime-ready-patterns
description: Each runtime dataclass defines ClassVar ready_pattern (regex) and ready_timeout_seconds; RuntimeAdapter protocol includes these fields for uniform ready detection
